meta.name: nono-ai-install
meta.description: Install hardening profile: used by `make update` to run `npm install -g` inside a sandbox that allows writes only to the npm prefix and network only to the npm registry. Combined with --ignore-scripts this neuters the postinstall-hook supply-chain attack vector. Even if a published package's runtime JS is compromised, that JS runs later under the per-CLI profile, not under this install profile.
